arts.ttl: Team News: Ruben Amorim confirms Man United XI for FA Cup showdown with Fulham at Old Trafford

arts.sum: Live FA Cup updates from 4.30pm UK time Why not email Daniel with your thoughts Manchester United (3-4-3): Onana; De Ligt, Maguire, Yoro; Dalot Fernandes, Ugarte, Mazraoui; Eriksen, Zirkzee; Hojlund. Subs: Graczyk, Murdock, Heaven, Lindelof, Casemiro, Garnacho, Obi. Fulham (4-2-3-1): Leno; Castagne, Andersen, Bassey, Robinson; Berge, Lukic; Traore, Pereira, Iwobi; Muniz. Subs: Benda, Cuenca, Diop, Sessegnon, Reed, Cairney, Smith Rowe, Willian, Jimenez. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Man United inform club they will pay 20-goal target’s release clause in summer
arts.sum: Manchester United are looking to improve their attacking unit with the signing of Victor Osimhen at the end of the season. The 26-year-old Nigerian International is on loan at Turkish club Galatasaray from Napoli. He has 20 goals in all competitions and he is widely regarded as one of the best strikers in the world.
